subcodes.first_line: O namesake of the Chaste One! The sea of bounty hath surged so high as to flood the shores of existence
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی سید حصور بحر الطاف بی پایان چنان برجی باوج زد که سواحل کائنات از فیض
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @call to action, @power of the mind over nature, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
